sections.biography-source-undefined: After Yuan Shao took his forces and defeated Gongsun Zan, Wei Commandery rebelled against him. The rebels joined with bandit leader Yu Du and besieged Ye City, the administrative center of the commandery. It fell and Li Cheng, the Grand Administrator, was slain by the victorious rebels.

full_text:
Li Cheng 栗成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Cheng (栗成). Overthrown by Heishan bandits led by Yu Du and killed. Li Cheng was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Li Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Grand Administrator of Yecheng
BiographySource Undefined
After Yuan Shao took his forces and defeated Gongsun Zan, Wei Commandery rebelled against him. The rebels joined with bandit leader Yu Du and besieged Ye City, the administrative center of the commandery. It fell and Li Cheng, the Grand Administrator, was slain by the victorious rebels.
